'''pagate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cadaverically|cadaverically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-g-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cadaverically|cadaverically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| pagate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:pagate|pagate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pagatesher|pagatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pagatesherĂ«m|pagatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pagatero|pagatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pagateshĂ«|pagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pagateshĂ«m|pagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipagatero|gokipagatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipagateshĂ«|gokipagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipagateshĂ«m|gokipagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopagankerom|gopagankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopagankeshĂ«|gopagankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopagankeshĂ«m|gopagankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopagankeya|gopagankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pagaterom|pagaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pagatemu|pagatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pagateya|pagateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipagaterom|gokipagaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipagatemu|gokipagatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipagateya|gokipagateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:pagagate|pagagate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pagagatesher|pagagatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pagagatesherĂ«m|pagagatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pagagatero|pagagatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pagagateshĂ«|pagagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pagagateshĂ«m|pagagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipagagatero|gokipagagatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipagagateshĂ«|gokipagagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipagagateshĂ«m|gokipagagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopagagankerom|gopagagankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopagagankeshĂ«|gopagagankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopagagankeshĂ«m|gopagagankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopagagankeya|gopagagankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pagagaterom|pagagaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pagagatemu|pagagatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pagagateya|pagagateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipagagaterom|gokipagagaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipagagatemu|gokipagagatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipagagateya|gokipagagateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:pĂŠgĂŠte|pĂŠgĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pĂŠgĂŠtesher|pĂŠgĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠgĂŠtesherĂ«m|pĂŠgĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pĂŠgĂŠtero|pĂŠgĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«|pĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m|pĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipĂŠgĂŠtero|gokipĂŠgĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«|gokipĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m|gokipĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopĂŠgĂŠnkerom|gopĂŠgĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«|gopĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gopĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopĂŠgĂŠnkeya|gopĂŠgĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pĂŠgĂŠterom|pĂŠgĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠgĂŠtemu|pĂŠgĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pĂŠgĂŠteya|pĂŠgĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipĂŠgĂŠterom|gokipĂŠgĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipĂŠgĂŠtemu|gokipĂŠgĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipĂŠgĂŠteya|gokipĂŠgĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:pafgafte|pafgafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pafgaftesher|pafgaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafgaftesherĂ«m|pafgaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pafgaftero|pafgaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pafgafteshĂ«|pafgafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafgafteshĂ«m|pafgafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipafgaftero|gokipafgaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipafgafteshĂ«|gokipafgafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafgafteshĂ«m|gokipafgafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopafgafnkerom|gopafgafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopafgafnkeshĂ«|gopafgafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopafgafnkeshĂ«m|gopafgafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopafgafnkeya|gopafgafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pafgafterom|pafgafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafgaftemu|pafgaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pafgafteya|pafgafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipafgafterom|gokipafgafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafgaftemu|gokipafgaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipafgafteya|gokipafgafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
